props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: position
props.description: Position badge in one of the corners of a link or button.

props.name: shape
props.description: Select the shape of the component.

props.name: textBgColor
props.description: Sets the component's color scheme to one of CoreUI's themed colors, ensuring the text color contrast adheres to the WCAG 4.5:1 contrast ratio standard for accessibility.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Sets the text color of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.
